staffing_buffer.meaning: Department-level external capacity relative to initial authorized capacity.
staffing_buffer.realization_path: Adds direct department capacity after intervention; it is not personal support.
staffing_buffer.dormancy_condition: None after intervention, but high values are expensive under the budget.

workload_triage_support.meaning: Finite capacity for approved deadline triage requests.
workload_triage_support.realization_path: Changes eligible deadlines only after a request enters and wins the management docket.
workload_triage_support.dormancy_condition: No effect when no eligible triage request is raised or approved.

manager_support.meaning: Finite temporary support envelope allocated by the management gate.
manager_support.realization_path: Approved support creates next-month temporary department capacity and a bounded requester recovery effect.
manager_support.dormancy_condition: No effect without eligible support requests and available docket capacity.

management_case_capacity.meaning: Maximum privacy-minimized management docket entries per department per month.
management_case_capacity.realization_path: Increases how many employee requests can enter the monthly management docket. It does not by itself increase support, triage, reform, explanation, or specialist envelopes.
management_case_capacity.dormancy_condition: No effect when request volume is at or below the current docket capacity; approvals still require finite envelopes and identity-valid requests.

explanation_quality.meaning: Capacity for management explanations in response to employee requests.
explanation_quality.realization_path: Determines a finite number of explanation approvals in the management docket.

preference_matching.meaning: Weight placed on structured employee transfer preferences.
preference_matching.realization_path: Changes simultaneous transfer-plan scoring when transfer capacity is positive.
preference_matching.dormancy_condition: Dormant when no transfer can occur or no valid preference request exists.

learning_access_probability.meaning: Probability that an employee receives protected learning access in a month.
learning_access_probability.realization_path: A keyed draw grants protected learning time, which then affects time allocation and knowledge accumulation.
learning_access_probability.dormancy_condition: protected_learning_share must be positive for a granted draw to reserve time.

protected_learning_share.meaning: Share of time protected for learning when access is granted.
protected_learning_share.realization_path: Reserves time before the remaining work mix is allocated.
protected_learning_share.dormancy_condition: Dormant when learning access is not granted.

digital_support.realization_path: A keyed draw creates a realized digital event that affects productive capacity and learning mechanisms.
digital_support.dormancy_condition: No effect in months where the draw is not realized.

process_reform_support.meaning: Finite capacity for approving employee process-reform proposals.
process_reform_support.realization_path: Approved reform requests create bounded process modernization exposure.
process_reform_support.dormancy_condition: No effect without eligible reform proposals.

specialist_track_access.meaning: Finite access to specialist-career treatment after an employee request.
specialist_track_access.realization_path: Approved requests create identity-bound specialist exposure.

appeal_channel.meaning: Probability that an eligible completed transfer receives an appeal channel.
appeal_channel.realization_path: Applies only after a transfer event and identity-safe event delivery.

hiring_fill_rate.meaning: Share of open slots targeted for filling at each hiring interval.
hiring_fill_rate.realization_path: Caps batch hiring together with hiring_capacity_rate.
hiring_fill_rate.dormancy_condition: Dormant when there are no open slots.

hiring_capacity_rate.meaning: Maximum hires per hiring interval as a share of authorized slots.
hiring_capacity_rate.realization_path: Sets the batch hiring capacity at six-month intervals.
hiring_capacity_rate.dormancy_condition: Dormant when there are no vacancies; values below one hire after flooring may be inactive at small test scale.

midcareer_hire_share.meaning: Share of hires drawn as mid-career profiles.
midcareer_hire_share.realization_path: Changes profile composition for realized hires.

transfer_capacity_rate.meaning: Maximum simultaneous transfers as a share of active staff.
transfer_capacity_rate.realization_path: Sets transfer-plan capacity at six-month intervals.
transfer_capacity_rate.dormancy_condition: May floor to zero in small pilots; full development uses enough staff for positive baseline capacity.

involuntary_transfer_share.meaning: Eligibility share for involuntary transfer consideration.
involuntary_transfer_share.realization_path: Changes which active employees can enter involuntary transfer candidates.
involuntary_transfer_share.dormancy_condition: Dormant when transfer capacity is zero.

transfer_explanation_quality.meaning: Probability that a realized transfer includes a credible explanation event.
transfer_explanation_quality.realization_path: Applies after transfer execution and identity-safe event routing.

productivity_savings_capture.meaning: Share of realized productivity savings converted into capacity rather than absorbed elsewhere.
productivity_savings_capture.realization_path: Scales the productive effect of realized digital/process modernization.
